mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warning_record (rule_id, process_id, warning_content, level, status) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{processId}, #{warningContent}, #{level}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT wr.*, r.rule_name, p.process_name FROM warning_record wr LEFT JOIN warning_rule r ON wr.rule_id = r.id LEFT JOIN process_info p ON wr.process_id = p.id WHERE wr.id = #{id}
SELECT wr.*, r.rule_name, p.process_name FROM warning_record wr LEFT JOIN warning_rule r ON wr.rule_id = r.id LEFT JOIN process_info p ON wr.process_id = p.id ORDER BY wr.create_time DESC

SELECT wr.*, r.rule_name, p.process_name FROM warning_record wr LEFT JOIN warning_rule r ON wr.rule_id = r.id LEFT JOIN process_info p ON wr.process_id = p.id WHERE wr.status = #{status} ORDER BY wr.create_time DESC
